Class Product

java.lang.Object
Product
public class Product extends Object
Represents a product in the inventory system. Each product has an ID, name, price, category, stock quantity, and a set of tags.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • Product

      public Product(String iD, String name, double price, String category, int stock, Set<String> tags)
      Constructs a new Product with all fields initialized.
      Parameters:
      iD - The product's unique identifier.
      name - The name of the product.
      price - The price of the product.
      category - The category the product belongs to.
      stock - The quantity available in inventory.
      tags - A set of tags associated with the product.

  • Method Details

    • setID

      public void setID(String newID)
      Sets the product ID.
      Parameters:
      newID - The new ID to assign.

    • setName

      public void setName(String newName)
      Sets the product name.
      Parameters:
      newName - The new name to assign.

    • setPrice

      public void setPrice(double newPrice)
      Sets the product price.
      Parameters:
      newPrice - The new price value.

    • setCategory

      public void setCategory(String newCategory)
      Sets the product category.
      Parameters:
      newCategory - The new category name.

    • setStock

      public void setStock(int newStock)
      Sets the product's stock quantity.
      Parameters:
      newStock - The new stock amount.

    • setTags

      public void setTags(Set<String> newTags)
      Sets the tags associated with the product.
      Parameters:
      newTags - A new set of tags.

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Determines whether two Product objects are equal by comparing their IDs.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      obj - The object to compare to.
      Returns:
      true if the IDs match, false otherwise.

      Generates a hash code based on the product ID.
